faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Kearny range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Kearny properties frequently deal with carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older wooden structures, while pavement ants are common around driveways and foundations throughout the area.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an ant problem in Kearny?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Kearny residents in most cases. Our proximity to the area allows us to respond quickly to urgent ant infestations, and we work around your schedule to minimize disruption to your home or business.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our licensed technicians follow strict safety protocols and can discuss pet-safe and family-friendly solutions during your free inspection.
